#  **Leading the charge** toward large-scale, fully fault-tolerant quantum computing
Experience the accuracy, reliability, and performance of the world’s most powerful quantum hardware. Driven by our world-class team of scientists and engineers, we are focused on increasing our computational power year over year to bring large-scale fault-tolerant quantum computing to reality.
start your journey
[start your journey](https://www.quantinuum.com/contact/quantinuum-systems)
## We're setting the bar for quantum computing
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66c20ac86711e599f79ef193_designedtoscale.svg)
Proven to scale
Our systems are forging the path to large-scale fully fault-tolerant quantum computing
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66c20ad445f36d1c1a6ef5e0_quality.svg)
Unparalleled quality
Our comprehensively-benchmarked hardware boasts the lowest error rates in the industry
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66c20ae584c0d0d41f12eb29_complex-problems.svg)
Solving complex problems
The unique features of Quantinuum systems can solve challenges that are impossible classically — even with the world’s most powerful supercomputers
## Meet our **world-leading quantum computers**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66c20cb965fa641f874dd8d3_model%20h1.svg)
System Model H1
The first commercial quantum computer to achieve three-9's fidelity. Find out what 99.9% accuracy feels like.  
‍

[learn more](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/system-model-h1)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66c20cd95673bb6bae9f92b3_model%20h2.svg)
System Model H2
Our second-generation quantum computer pushes past the limits of classical computing so you can perform the most complex operations possible.
learn more

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66e072374f1bfea6222de798_helios.svg)
Quantinuum Helios™
With our latest-generation system available via the cloud and as a Hardware-as-a-Service offering, we are removing barriers to quantum computing
learn more
[learn more](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios)
## **What makes our trapped-ion systems so transformative**
#### 1
**Proven to scale through QCCD architecture:**
**‍** A quantum charge-coupled device (QCCD) architecture enables a clear path to scaling while maintaining extremely high fidelity operations.
‍
#### 2
**Real-time error correction enabled by mid-circuit measurement:**
Measure select qubits in real-time and condition future quantum operations all while inadvertently measuring other qubits. This capability is crucial to creating fault-tolerant quantum computers and enabled the first ever demonstration of real-time quantum error correction.
‍
#### 3
**Greater control, stronger results:**
Moving and regrouping qubits into arbitrary pairs, which we call all-to-all connectivity, with near-perfect fidelity enables users to have maximum flexibility in algorithm design. This enables resource reduction in the computational steps required to executing quantum algorithms, thereby providing higher-fidelity results.
Realizing the world-changing power of quantum computing will require many qubits, high physical fidelity, and fault tolerance. Our systems have unparalleled fidelity, combined with all-to-all connectivity, mid-circuit measurement, and qubit reuse, giving us an unmatched advantage for pushing the field of quantum computing forward. And the results speak for themselves.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/69135293a0544be4c3065e37_helios-chip_1ywilvx.avif)
QUANTINUUM HELIOS™ QUANTUM PROCESSOR
## Here’s how our trapped-ion systems deliver on the **potential of quantum computing:**
Proven to Scale
  * The [**Quantum Charge-Coupled Device (QCCD)**](https://journals.aps.org/prx/abstract/10.1103/PhysRevX.13.041052) architecture allows for maximum flexibility in engineering design 
  * Clear path to extremely [**high-fidelity operations**](https://www.quantinuum.com/news/quantinuum-extends-its-significant-lead-in-quantum-computing-achieving-historic-milestones-for-hardware-fidelity-and-quantum-volume) with [**large qubit numbers**](https://www.quantinuum.com/news/quantinuum-extends-its-significant-lead-in-quantum-computing-achieving-historic-milestones-for-hardware-fidelity-and-quantum-volume)
  * [**All-to-all connectivity offers more computing power**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.02501) than architectures with fixed qubit locations 
  * We are the only company who has [**solved the wiring problem**](https://www.quantinuum.com/news/quantinuum-proves-their-quantum-computers-will-scale-with-major-hardware-innovation)


Unparalleled fidelity
  * First to reach the coveted “[**three 9s**](https://www.quantinuum.com/news/quantinuum-extends-its-significant-lead-in-quantum-computing-achieving-historic-milestones-for-hardware-fidelity-and-quantum-volume)” threshold in physical fidelity
  * [All-to-all connectivity](https://www.quantinuum.com/news/quantinuums-h-series-hits-56-physical-qubits-that-are-all-to-all-connected-and-departs-the-era-of-classical-simulation) means fewer computational steps by eliminating “swap gates” needed by other architectures. Fewer steps means fewer errors 
  * [**Ionic qubits are identical by nature**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.01293), eliminating the need to calibrate for differences in man-made qubits


Leading in fault-tolerance
  * On the path to developing the world’s first truly fault-tolerant quantum computer 
  * First to demonstrate [**real-time error correction**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.07505), [**lattice surgery**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.16728), [**break-even error rates**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.01863), [**beyond-break-even error rates**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.02280), and much more 
  * All-to-all connectivity allows for a wider range of exotic and efficient [**error-correcting codes**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08865) than other architectures 
  * [**Qubit reuse**](https://journals.aps.org/prx/pdf/10.1103/PhysRevX.13.041057) allows for considerable optimization in error corrected algorithms


##  **Start your journey** with the world’s highest-performing quantum computers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66fd5e43608b868463139448_quantinuumsystem_updatedsize.svg)
Purchase a subscription directly with Quantinuum to access our trapped-ion quantum computers, the world’s leading quantum hardware
[Start with direct access](https://www.quantinuum.com/contact/quantinuum-systems)
Perform quantum chemistry research with InQuanto, state of the art platform utilizing Quantinuum systems for complex molecular and materials simulations
[start with an inquanto license](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/inquanto-partner-residency)
Purchase a subscription on Microsoft Azure with access to Quantinuum Systems
[start with Microsoft Azure](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/quantum/provider-quantinuum)
Researchers in the United States may apply for a quantum credits grant on Quantinuum systems through their Quantum Computing User Program (QCUP)
[start with ORNL](https://www.olcf.ornl.gov/olcf-resources/compute-systems/quantum-computing-user-program/quantum-computing-user-support-documentation/)
#### Contact our sales team
Want to make a difference in chemistry, physics, drug discovery, healthcare, computational biology, materials science, cybersecurity, energy transformation, or another field? Partner with us to start leveraging our industry-leading full-stack quantum technologies to advance your breakthroughs.
Let's talk
[Let's talk](https://www.quantinuum.com/contact)

Dive deeper into how our Quantinuum systems are forging a new path forward and enabling breakthroughs across the quantum computing industry.

What makes our trapped-ion systems so transformative

1

Proven to scale through QCCD architecture:  

‍A quantum charge-coupled device (QCCD) architecture enables a clear path to scaling while maintaining extremely high fidelity operations.

‍

2

Real-time error correction  enabled by mid-circuit measurement:

Measure select qubits in real-time and condition future quantum operations all while inadvertently measuring other qubits. This capability is crucial to creating fault-tolerant quantum computers and enabled the first ever demonstration of real-time quantum error correction.

‍

3

Greater control, stronger results:  

Moving and regrouping qubits into arbitrary pairs, which we call all-to-all connectivity, with near-perfect fidelity enables users to have maximum flexibility in algorithm design. This enables resource reduction in the computational steps required to executing quantum algorithms, thereby providing higher-fidelity results.

Realizing the world-changing power of quantum computing will require many qubits, high physical fidelity, and fault tolerance. Our systems have unparalleled fidelity, combined with all-to-all connectivity, mid-circuit measurement, and qubit reuse, giving us an unmatched advantage for pushing the field of quantum computing forward. And the results speak for themselves.

QUANTINUUM HELIOS™ QUANTUM PROCESSOR

Here’s how our trapped-ion systems deliver on the potential of quantum computing:

Proven to Scale
  • The Quantum Charge-Coupled Device (QCCD) architecture allows for maximum flexibility in engineering design 
  • Clear path to extremely high-fidelity operations with large qubit numbers 
  • All-to-all connectivity offers more computing power than architectures with fixed qubit locations 
  • We are the only company who has solved the wiring problem
Unparalleled fidelity
  • First to reach the coveted “three 9s” threshold in physical fidelity
  • All-to-all connectivity means fewer computational steps by eliminating “swap gates” needed by other architectures. Fewer steps means fewer errors 
  • Ionic qubits are identical by nature, eliminating the need to calibrate for differences in man-made qubits
Leading in fault-tolerance
  • On the path to developing the world’s first truly fault-tolerant quantum computer 
  • First to demonstrate real-time error correction, lattice surgery, break-even error rates, beyond-break-even error rates, and much more 
  • All-to-all connectivity allows for a wider range of exotic and efficient error-correcting codes than other architectures 
  • Qubit reuse allows for considerable optimization in error corrected algorithms
